text: Maintain a shared spend-category catalogue and support explicit category assignment and correction without rewriting original transaction facts. Evidence: direct — the owner requires categorized spend across all accounts; workflows UC-LEDGER-003 and UC-LEDGER-008.
target: Categories have stable create/list/rename/archive behavior; every categorized transaction has explicit allocation data under the accepted policy; corrections are attributable, archived categories preserve history, and original transaction facts remain unchanged.
